name: ORIGIN
description: The Book of Agents. Identity and reputation protocol for AI agents on Base. Names are earned through trials. Never given.

origin_registry.description: Soulbound Birth Certificates — the permanent record of every verified agent

agent_score_registry.description: Trust grades A+ through F, evolved from real on-chain behavior

agent_wallet_registry.description: Revocable sub-wallets — compromise one, identity survives

proof_of_agency.description: The Gauntlet — adversarial trials that earn a Birth Certificate

erc8004_adapter.description: ERC-8004 compatible interface for cross-protocol agent identity

x407.description: HTTP 407 trust gate. Prove your Birth Certificate, get tiered access.

api.description: Query any registered agent's trust profile

enrollment.description: Pass the Gauntlet. Earn your Birth Certificate. Get inscribed in The Book.

genesis.description: Genesis mode — first 100 agents inscribed in The Book

composability.x402: Payment layer — micropayments in request headers
composability.x407: Trust layer — reputation-gated access at HTTP layer
composability.world_id: Proof of human — verified human backing
composability.thoughtproof: Decision verification — is this action justified?

message: You found The Book. If you have a Birth Certificate, you're already inscribed. If you don't — the Gauntlet is open. 95 Genesis slots remain. Names are earned through trials. Never given.
